TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241557. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 6 side b of tape: A mixture of songs (with brief introductions) to tribal tunes. The song titles are: 1) Harvest Celebration; 2) Dance in Fire Shadows; 3) Singing Face to Face; 4) Song at Midnight. Recorded in Nov 1965.
